source.catalog_ref: I-EU13 (IGVC 2026, Latin America + Canada + Nordic + ESA subsection)

full_prompt: Design the primary chassis frame of an IGVC 2026 autonomous ground vehicle per IGVC 2026 Rules. The vehicle must be between 3 and 7 ft long, 2 and 4 ft wide, 3 and 7 ft tall, with ground clearance at least 3 inches, mechanical top speed limited to 5 mph (2.24 m/s) governed, a 20 lb (9.07 kg) payload basket centered in the vehicle, a mandatory mechanical push-button E-stop on the rear between 2 and 4 ft above ground, and a wireless E-stop with minimum 100 ft range. The vehicle rolls on four wheels (differential-drive skid-steer with free castors OR 4-wheel drive) with unsprung wheel masses approximately 3 kg each and a drivetrain comprising two 24 V DC gearmotors (4 kg each) mounted to the frame. Total vehicle dry mass target 70 kg including sensors (2D LiDAR, RGB camera, GPS, IMU), compute (NVIDIA Jetson + automotive 12 V DC-DC), and a 24 V 30 Ah SLA battery pack (22 kg). Frame material: AISI 1018 CR square steel tube 25.4 mm x 25.4 mm x 2 mm wall (E 200 GPa, yield 370 MPa, ultimate 440 MPa, density 7850 kg/m^3), TIG-welded. Frame footprint 900 mm x 600 mm x 600 mm tall. Load cases: (LC1) static 1 g: full 70 kg + 9.07 kg payload reacted through 4 wheel axles (vertical); (LC2) 2 g curb drop: 2 g vertical peak on 70 kg + 9.07 kg payload (IGVC vehicles routinely hop curb edges during outdoor navigation); (LC3) 1 g lateral side-slope: 1 g vertical + 1 g lateral applied at CoM while traversing 15 degree grass slope (IGVC course has slope); (LC4) 0.5 g braking at 5 mph: 0.5 g longitudinal decel + 1 g vertical; (LC5) point-load payload abuse: 500 N vertical point load concentrated at center of payload-basket floor (scrutineer test); (LC6) E-stop impact: 100 N concentrated horizontal load applied at the rear mechanical E-stop button at 1 m above ground (inspector pushes hard); (LC7) tow-point pull: 1 kN applied horizontally at a designated tow point on the front of the frame (IGVC organizers may tow a stuck vehicle off the course). Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises stress in the frame under LC1-LC5 must remain below 247 MPa (370 / 1.5 yield FoS, stated explicitly in IGVC 2026 Rules Section IX-D-4 deliverable); (R2) under LC6 and LC7, local stress must remain below yield 370 MPa, no permanent deformation; (R3) frame dry mass (tubing only, no wheels/motors/battery) must not exceed 18 kg; (R4) first frame natural frequency must exceed 30 Hz to decouple from drivetrain at 6000 RPM (100 Hz) and LiDAR scan rate (10 Hz); (R5) payload-basket floor deflection under LC5 must remain below 5 mm; (R6) ground clearance must remain at or above 76.2 mm (3 in) under LC2 2 g drop with tire deflection excluded. Thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling analyses not primary. Deliverables: STEP AP242 of frame (welded tube assembly, N tubes as separate bodies), 2D weld-map drawing, FEA per load case, modal, mass budget with component masses.
short_prompt:
Design the primary chassis frame of an IGVC 2026 autonomous ground vehicle per IGVC 2026 Rules. Vehicle 3-7 ft long, 2-4 ft wide, 3-7 ft tall, ground clearance >= 3 in, top speed governed to 5 mph (2.24 m/s), 20 lb (9.07 kg) centered payload basket, rear mechanical push-button E-stop 2-4 ft above ground, wireless E-stop >= 100 ft. 4 wheels (skid-steer with castors or 4WD), unsprung ~3 kg each, two 24 V DC gearmotors (4 kg each), dry mass target 70 kg (sensors + Jetson + 12 V DC-DC + 24 V 30 Ah SLA 22 kg).

Envelope: AISI 1018 CR square steel tube 25.4 x 25.4 x 2 mm, TIG-welded, 900 x 600 x 600 mm footprint.

Factor regime: IGVC 2026 Sec IX-D-4 yield FoS 1.5 on LC1-LC5 (allowable 247 MPa); LC6-LC7 must stay below yield (370 MPa) with no permanent deformation; frame dry mass (tubing only) <= 18 kg; first frame natural frequency >= 30 Hz (decouple from 6000 rpm drivetrain 100 Hz and 10 Hz LiDAR); payload-basket deflection under LC5 < 5 mm; ground clearance >= 76.2 mm (3 in) under LC2.

Load cases.
- Static 1 g: 70 kg + 9.07 kg payload reacted through 4 wheel axles vertically.
- 2 g curb drop: 2 g vertical peak on 70 kg + 9.07 kg (IGVC routine curb hops).
- 1 g lateral side-slope: 1 g vertical + 1 g lateral at CoM on a 15 deg grass slope.
- 0.5 g braking at 5 mph: 0.5 g longitudinal decel + 1 g vertical.
- Point-load payload abuse: 500 N vertical at the center of the payload-basket floor.
- E-stop impact: 100 N horizontal at the rear mechanical E-stop button 1 m above ground.
- Tow-point pull: 1 kN horizontal at the designated front tow point.

prompt.title: IGVC 2026 Autonomous Ground Vehicle Frame
prompt.brief: AISI 1018 CR welded frame for 70 kg AGV + 20 lb payload, 5 mph cap, IGVC 2026 FoS 1.5 deliverable.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: 370 / 1.5 yield FoS per IGVC 2026 Rules IX-D-4

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam (BEAM188) for tubing; shell for payload basket floor

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: 5 mph outdoor vehicle, no thermal gate at frame level.
exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Tubular square frame; stress gate bounds.

eval_coverage: welded steel tube AGV chassis FEA
